content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Completed the pending amendment by ensuring direct ProjectRecord deserialization sites outside FsProjectStore enforce validate_task_source immediately after toml::from_str. workspace_governance now rejects corrupt task_source metadata during project selection and active milestone lookup, and workflow_composition prompt-hash sync now fails before mutating project.toml when task_source has only one side populated. Added regression tests for the reproduced project selection, active milestone lookup, and prompt-hash sync corruption paths.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the pending-amendment sites in workspace_governance and workflow_composition drift, plus remaining toml::from_str call sites, to identify direct ProjectRecord readers.
1. [Completed] Validated that active_project_milestone_id, validate_project_exists, and sync_project_prompt_hash now call ProjectRecord::validate_task_source immediately after deserialization and return CorruptRecord on invalid task metadata.
2. [Completed] Added regression coverage in active_project_test for project selection and active milestone lookup rejecting one-sided task_source metadata.
3. [Completed] Added regression coverage in workflow_composition drift tests for prompt-hash sync rejecting corrupt task_source metadata without rewriting the persisted prompt hash.
4. [Completed] Ran focused tests and full repository verification gates required by the bead.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop -c cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub --test unit active_project_test passed: 7 passed, 0 failed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub workflow_composition::drift::tests::prompt_hash_sync_rejects_corrupt_task_source_metadata passed: 1 passed, 0 failed.
- nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub passed: lib 1221 passed / 6 ignored, CLI 373 passed / 3 ignored, run_attach_tmux 1 passed, unit 1091 passed / 1 ignored, doctests 0 passed / 9 ignored.
- nix build passed.
- git diff --check passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
